title: OKE: Kubernetes Attack Path Link
description: Link visualization for OKE Kubernetes attacks, grouping attack stage, trace, span, and host evidence into a single investigation graph.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Service Namespace' = 'octo' and 'Attack ID' like 'attack-oke-*' and 'Trace ID' != null | link span = 5minute 'Attack ID', 'Attack Stage', 'Trace ID', 'Span ID' | eventstats distinctcount('Attack ID') as Attacks, sum(Count) as Events, distinctcount('Trace ID') as Traces, distinctcount('Span ID') as Spans

ask_ai_prompts: Read the Kubernetes attack path link and name the earliest event that should trigger incident response.
